# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.180.0/http/server.ts";

type FilterCriteria = Record<string, string | number | boolean>;

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age: number;
  active: boolean;
  createdAt: Date;
}

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

async function searchUsers(filters: FilterCriteria): Promise<User[]> {
  const results: User[] = [];
  const prefix: (string | number)[] = ["users"];
  
  // Build dynamic key prefix based on filters
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(filters)) {
    prefix.push(key, value);
  }
  
  const iter = kv.list({ prefix });
  
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    const user = entry.value as User;
    results.push(user);
  }
  
  return results;
}

async function getUserById(userId: string): Promise<User | null> {
  const key = ["users", userId];
  const result = await kv.get<User>(key);
  return result.value;
}

async function createUser(user: User): Promise<void> {
  const key = ["users", user.id];
  await kv.set(key, user);
  
  // Create additional indexed keys for efficient querying
  const indexes = [
    ["users", "email", user.email],
    ["users", "name", user.name],
    ["users", "active", user.active],
    ["users", "age", user.age],
  ];
  
  for (const index of indexes) {
    await kv.set(index, user.id);
  }
}

async function updateUser(userId: string, updates: Partial<User>): Promise<void> {
  const key = ["users", userId];
  const user = await kv.get<User>(key);
  
  if (!user.value) {
    throw new Error("User not found");
  }
  
  const updatedUser = { ...user.value, ...updates };
  await kv.set(key, updatedUser);
  
  // Update indexes
  const indexes = [
    ["users", "email", updatedUser.email],
    ["users", "name", updatedUser.name],
    ["users", "active", updatedUser.active],
    ["users", "age", updatedUser.age],
  ];
  
  for (const index of indexes) {
    await kv.set(index, updatedUser.id);
  }
}

async function deleteUser(userId: string): Promise<void> {
  const key = ["users", userId];
  const user = await kv.get<User>(key);
  
  if (!user.value) {
    throw new Error("User not found");
  }
  
  await kv.delete(key);
  
  // Remove indexes
  const indexes = [
    ["users", "email", user.value.email],
    ["users", "name", user.value.name],
    ["users", "active", user.value.active],
    ["users", "age", user.value.age],
  ];
  
  for (const index of indexes) {
    await kv.delete(index);
  }
}

serve(async (req: Request) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;
  
  if (path === "/users" && method === "GET") {
    const filters: FilterCriteria = {};
    
    for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
      filters[key] = value;
    }
    
    try {
      const users = await searchUsers(filters);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(users), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }
  }
  
  if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "GET") {
    const userId = path.split("/")[3];
    try {
      const user = await getUserById(userId);
      if (!user) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        });
      }
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(user), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }
  }
  
  if (path === "/users" && method === "POST") {
    try {
      const userData = await req.json();
      await createUser(userData);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ message: "User created" }), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }
  }
  
  if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "PUT") {
    const userId = path.split("/")[3];
    try {
      const updates = await req.json();
      await updateUser(userId, updates);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ message: "User updated" }), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }
  }
  
  if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "DELETE") {
    const userId = path.split("/")[3];
    try {
      await deleteUser(userId);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ message: "User deleted" }), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }
  }
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
    status: 404,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
});
